title: Homework 7 — Working with molecules
intro: Your first computational-chemistry homework. You'll use RDKit — a real cheminformatics toolkit — to turn text descriptions of molecules into objects you can measure. It runs in Google Colab (free, nothing to install). Open it, work through the problems, then come back and check in.
preview:
from rdkit import Chem
from rdkit.Chem import Descriptors

caffeine = Chem.MolFromSmiles("CN1C=NC2=C1C(=O)N(C(=O)N2C)C")
print(round(Descriptors.MolWt(caffeine), 1))   # 194.2
question: Run the check-in cell at the end of the notebook. What molecular weight did it print for caffeine (to 1 decimal)?
